docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-20-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-22-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JULIA BUKHAREVA IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM WITH WITNESS RIAD JAFAROU, HUSBAND. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF SHOWN WHERE TO ENTER THE NEW DATE ON THEIR SC-100 FORM FOR SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
